query:
SELECT
            CASE
                WHEN o.is_personal THEN 'personal'
                WHEN s.status = 'active' THEN 'team_active'
                ELSE 'team_other'
            END AS "tier!",
            COUNT(*)::bigint AS "count!"
        FROM orgs o
        LEFT JOIN org_subscriptions s ON s.org_id = o.id
        GROUP BY 1
